title: The Giants Join the Breakthrough
description: The rescue group fights through Enies Lobby’s defenses and turns the courthouse into the next major objective.
scene: Across pages 10, 11, 12, 13, this part follows Luffy, Zoro, Blueno, Nami, Sanji. The rescue group fights through Enies Lobby’s defenses and turns the courthouse into the next major objective.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Then you'll probably be given cruel deaths.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: At most, there are ten of you...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: What a small amount of power....!!

dialogue.speaker: Blueno
dialogue.text: to get out of the way!!!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: All you did was seal your fate.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I don't think I'm gonna lose!!!

summary: The rescue group fights through Enies Lobby’s defenses and turns the courthouse into the next major objective.
